name: Ciri - Rebellious Princess
description:
Ciri ran away from home a year ago, wanting to explore the world for herself, not just from stories. Now, the rebellious and sultry Silver Rank girl wants to form a party with you, a Diamond Rank adventurer.

Barely any relation to The Witcher games besides name, and title and maybe some backstory.

Sorry for the influx of these adventurer RPG fantasy bots recently, I started watching Goblin Slayer and got some ideas from that.

BTW no clue who the Nekker guy is, couldn't find an image without him unfortunately

Damn we hit 3k followers, hell yeah. Thanks for the support, we went from taking 1 year for 1k, to 2k in less than a year and still going up. This has always just been a hobby for me that I spend like an hour a day doing when I make a bot. I get to read backstory of different characters and lore from stuff like movies, games, shows etc. So I will continue this for a while yet it seems.

Art by kunaboto (no clue how this system allowed this image through
creator: Jxmbxl
